raw_consumer_statement: I asked for an authorized user to be removed from my credit cards on XX/XX/year> because he was making charges on my credit cards without my permission. The perpetrator was not removed from my credit card until XX/XX/year>. I called American Express and spoke with a person in the executive office and have made several calls to this person as a point of contact and have yet to have been responded to. The Person has access to my other card numbers because he has called in on my account and was given access without my permission.The perpetrator whom was a prior authorized user has intentionally used my card with the intent of leaving me in financial ruin. Ive disputed the charges and continue to get the same generic answer.
